raw_text: eduardo aranda cuerva tf: +34 653 856 256 eduardoarandac@gmail.com www.linkedin.com/in/eduardo-aranda-cuerva-417987163 av./ derechos humanos 31 1a, leganés (madrid, spain) 28914 birth: 23" september 1996 aeronautical engineer looking for a new future in the industry, where an agreement with the environment is possible. excited and determined to show the world what am capable to do. greatly interested in structural and aerodynamical calculus, but ready to work in teams where other skills and knowledge are required. strong communicator and team player. academic qualifications e degree in aerospace engineering aerospace technologies and sciences technical university of madrid (upm) school of aeronautical and space engineering sep. 2013 jul. 2018: 4 school years licensed with an average grade of 7.53 / 10 (upper second). honours in statistics (2"y year) and graphic design (3 year). outstanding grades also in thermodynamics (2" year), rocket engines (4' year) and rotary-wing aircrafts (4 year). e awarded with excellence scholarship by the community of madrids education ministry, for obtaining grades higher than 8.85 / 10 (first class) in access to university exams. sep. 2011 jun. 2013 experience e internship simulations engineer & drone hopper. madrid, spain. dronehopper 1st mar. 319! may 2018, 5h per day. development of non-stationary aerodynamic simulations, and design of aerodynamic systems of the vehicle. mathematic models for simplified performances of multirotor drone. page 1 of 2 +34 653 856 256 eduardo aranda cuerva eduardoarandac@gmail.com languages e spanish as native language. e english with b2 level certified by cambridge university. nowadays, studying to improve my level. it skills advanced knowledge of programming in matlab. specially qualified for finite elements modelling and vibroacoustic studies, thanks to the development of my end-of-degree project, titled: simulación de respuesta vibroacustica en estructuras planas mediante modelos de elementos finitos (vibroacoustic response in thin structures simulation using finite elements modelling). available at: http://oa.upm.es/52466/ design in 3d software like catia and solidworks, acquired during university internship and several team work activities during my studies at university. fluid setting simulations with ansys fluent studying aerodynamic phenomena, stationary and non-stationary. multifunctional optimization models and non-linear equations solver programmed in matlab and fortran 95. additional information personal tutor of several students preparing the access to university exams, for the last 4 years. this experience develops my oral communication skills and my capacity of time management. 4 years of experience with driving license. own car availability. team work in diverse occasions, not only in the university but also during my internship. cooperating with other people, have been aware of my capacity of team leadership and my efficacy in the carried-out work. always curious about the aerospace industry and conscious about the actual situation of the market. page 2 of 2
